cards.title: Invasion of the Blorbs
cards.body:
It started on a Tuesday, as most invasions do.` + `The blorbs came without warning, a shimmering wave rolling across the cityscape. At first, people thought it was a mirage or some kind of atmospheric anomaly. 
 But as the blorbs solidified into gelatinous, translucent creatures, panic set in. They were about the size of a car, with no discernible features except for a faint, pulsating glow from within. The blorbs moved with an eerie grace, undulating through the streets and enveloping everything in their path. They seemed to consume matter, leaving behind only a slimy residue. Scientists were baffled, unable to determine their origin or purpose. The government issued evacuation orders, but the blorbs were relentless, spreading like a viscous tide. As the world watched in horror, it became clear that this was not just an invasion—it was an extinction event.`

cards.title: Tales From Behind the Desk
cards.body: The office was quiet, save for the soft hum of computers and the occasional creak of a chair. Then, out of nowhere, a loud crash echoed through the room. Everyone looked up to see a paper airplane had crashed into the monitor of the poor soul who had been trying to finish a report. The room erupted in laughter, and for a moment, the stress of the day was forgotten.
